growth_records.cite: Madin JS et al. A synthesis of bacterial and archaeal phenotypic trait data. Sci Data 7:170 (2020); source dataset: engqvist.
growth_records.notes: Species-level trait record; culture mode/pH often unspecified; medium + uptake/secretion pending literature curation.

growth_records.cite: Plugge CM et al. Metabolic Flexibility of Sulfate-Reducing Bacteria. Frontiers in Microbiology (2011). DOI:10.3389/fmicb.2011.00081. [PMC3119409]
growth_records.snippet: Syntrophobacter wolinii | Propionate 6.7** | Propionate + sulfate 0.062 | Wallrabenstein et al. (1994); **Only a doubling time (days) was determined
growth_records.notes: Table 1; the value 6.7 for S. wolinii on propionate carries footnote ** = 'Only a doubling time (days) was determined', so 6.7 is a doubling time in DAYS, not a day-1 growth rate. Primary source cited = Wallrabenstein et al. (1994). doubling_time = 6.7 d = 160.8 h; calculated mu = ln2/160.8 = 0.00431 h-1.

growth_records.cite: Plugge CM et al. Metabolic Flexibility of Sulfate-Reducing Bacteria. Frontiers in Microbiology (2011). DOI:10.3389/fmicb.2011.00081. [PMC3119409]
growth_records.snippet: Syntrophobacter wolinii | Propionate + sulfate 0.062 day-1 | Wallrabenstein et al. (1994)
growth_records.notes: Table 1, propionate + sulfate. Primary source cited = Wallrabenstein et al. (1994). Reported mu = 0.062 day-1; mu_h = 0.062/24 = 0.002583 h-1; doubling_time = ln2/0.002583 = 268.3 h.
